title: TaperFlangeISectionProfile
description: TaperFlangeISectionProfile: I-shaped profile with tapered flanges.

Height.description: Full depth between the extreme fibres of the flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Width.description: Full width of both flanges between the extreme fibres of the flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WebThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

FlangeThickness.description: Mean thickness of the flange, taken at 1/4 of the flange width. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

FlangeSlope.description: Slope of the flange inner faces, generally from 0 to 1/6. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

RootRadius.description: Fillet radius between inner face of the flanges and faces of the web. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

ToeRadius.description: Fillet radius at the end of the flanges. Value must be smaller or equal to the thickness of the flange at the tip. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Edges.description: Edge curves that matches the dimensions in the global XY-plane.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
